#ProductDesign #UX #Growth

KR
Kai Reyes Design
@kaidesigns 12h ago 🌍 Public
⋯
The most underrated design principle: progressive disclosure.

Show only what's needed right now. Everything else? One tap away. Users don't need to see all 47 options at once — they need confidence that the option exists when they need it.

#DesignThinking #UIUX
❤ 1.8k
💬 203
🔁 647
🔖 Save
↗ Share

LX
Luna Xi AI Research
@lunaximl 6h ago
⋯
Unpopular opinion: most "AI tools" are just fancy wrappers around GPT with a $29/mo subscription. The actual moat is in the data, the distribution, and the workflow — not the model.

Stop building API wrappers. Build systems.

#AI #ProductStrategy
❤ 8.9k
💬 1.2k
🔁 2.7k
